name: S-3 --flag-uncovered exits non-zero when a catalog source has zero citing rules
command:
mkdir -p tree/g && printf '
rules:
  - {id: r, provenance: [{source: g, section_id: "1.1"}]}
' > tree/g/x.yaml && printf -- '- id: g
  name: G
  url: x
  tier: 1
  applies_to: [x]
  fetch_frequency: daily
- id: uncovered-source
  name: U
  url: u
  tier: 1
  applies_to: [u]
  fetch_frequency: daily
' > catalog.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/build-coverage-matrix.sh" --tree tree --catalog catalog.yaml --flag-uncovered 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 1 ] && grep -q 'uncovered-source' err.txt && echo flagged 1>&2
